user.title: Create an aggregate Stremio library
user.description: Cinemeta can provide catalogs and metadata, Torrentio or other add-ons provide streams, and the PC stream-server serves video to the selected player.

data_description.catalog_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Cinemeta is suggested by default.
data_description.stream_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Torrentio is suggested by default.
data_description.default_media_player: Chromecast, Android TV or another media_player entity
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: One URL per line. OpenSubtitles v3 is suggested by default; leave empty to disable.

error.cannot_connect: Could not validate stream-server or one of the manifests. Check URLs, network, ports and firewall rules.

abort.already_configured: A library already exists for this stream-server.

data_description.exclude_keywords: Comma separated, for example CAM, TS, HDCAM.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Leave empty to disable subtitle providers.
data_description.ideal_link_filter: When enabled, automatic playback prefers 1080p, then the highest seeder count, then the smallest file. It overrides Preferred quality.
data_description.subtitle_mode: Automatic loads the first subtitle matching the preferred language list on Google Cast targets.
data_description.subtitle_languages: Comma separated ISO codes in priority order, for example spa, eng.
data_description.subtitle_convert_vtt: Downloads and converts subtitles in Home Assistant, then serves a temporary WebVTT URL with CORS. Falls back to stream-server conversion if necessary.
data_description.subtitle_base_url: Optional. Use the LAN URL reachable by the player, for example http://192.168.1.20:8123. Leave empty for automatic detection.

error.cannot_connect: Providers could not be validated. Changes were not saved.
